message:
refactor(workflows): extract Codex exit/session helpers to codex_exit.rs [ft-c45am]

Strangler fig extraction: move CodexExitOptions, CodexExitOutcome,
CodexTokenUsage, CodexSessionSummary, CodexSessionParseError, session
parsing functions, and regex statics (340 lines) into a dedicated
submodule. Private helpers become pub(super) for parent module access.

workflows/mod.rs: 20,980 → 20,651 lines (-329 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
